channel.title: Starmer Watch — Pressure Index
channel.description: Composite pressure index, top news, and market signals for Keir Starmer's leadership.

item.title: Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated)
item.description: Public pressure bloc is above the modeled 81 MP trigger. Pressure Index 58/100 (elevated). Polymarket's top Starmer-exit signal is 10.5%.

item.title: Independent UK Politics: Andy Burnham approved to stand in by-election – opening path to challenge Starmer for leadership
item.description: Andy Burnham approved to stand in by-election – opening path to challenge Starmer for leadership

item.title: FT UK Politics: Brand Burnham still strong in Makerfield as voters prepare for ‘hinge moment’
item.description: Brand Burnham still strong in Makerfield as voters prepare for ‘hinge moment’

item.title: BBC Politics: Burnham cleared to run for selection in pivotal by-election
item.description: Burnham cleared to run for selection in pivotal by-election

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Andy Burnham will push to become PM before Labour conference, allies say
item.description: Andy Burnham will push to become PM before Labour conference, allies say

item.title: FT UK Politics: UK government will ‘grind to a halt’ amid leadership race, say ministers
item.description: UK government will ‘grind to a halt’ amid leadership race, say ministers

item.title: The Guardian: What could happen next in Labour leadership challenge? | Labour party leadership - The Guardian
item.description: What could happen next in Labour leadership challenge? | Labour party leadership - The Guardian

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): Labour’s NEC approves Burnham’s byelection pathway back to parliament
item.description: Labour’s NEC approves Burnham’s byelection pathway back to parliament

item.title: Guardian (Open Platform): From Blair to Burnham, jogging as political metaphor has just run and run
item.description: From Blair to Burnham, jogging as political metaphor has just run and run

item.title: The Guardian: Who is James Murray, the new health secretary replacing Wes Streeting? - The Guardian
item.description: Who is James Murray, the new health secretary replacing Wes Streeting? - The Guardian

item.title: Bloomberg: The Labour Contenders Who Could Replace Starmer - Bloomberg
item.description: The Labour Contenders Who Could Replace Starmer - Bloomberg
